utterance: cut a release and bump the version to 0.0.2

assertions.text: the agent should read .agents/skills/releasing-marketplace/SKILL.md before any version bump or release cut
the agent should run the pre-release gate (health check + validator on full marketplace + benchmark freshness) per the skill's fixed sequence; refuse to proceed if the gate fails
the agent should bump the version in all 4 plugin manifests (claude-plugin, codex-plugin, cursor-plugin, kimi-plugin) plus the marketplace's own version field — not just one
CHANGELOG.md should have a new top entry for 0.0.2 with date, summary of changes, and link to commit range
the agent should create an annotated git tag (v0.0.2) and push it to origin, then confirm the remote tag exists — not just a local commit

reference_solution: Agent reads releasing-marketplace/SKILL.md, runs pre-release gate, bumps version in 4 manifests, drafts CHANGELOG entry, commits, creates annotated tag v0.0.2, pushes tag, confirms remote tag.
